sceneData.title: Introduction
sceneData.imagePrompt: A sleek ASUS ROG Strix G15 laptop sits closed in a dark, futuristic studio. Cinematic smoke swirls around it as neon RGB lights reflect off its metallic surface. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.videoPrompt: The ASUS ROG Strix G15 laptop lid slowly opens, revealing the glowing keyboard and screen in a dark, futuristic studio with cinematic smoke and neon reflections. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: In the world of portable performance, a new champion emerges. Meet the ASUS ROG Strix G15.

sceneData.title: Processor Power
sceneData.imagePrompt: A stylized, glowing Ryzen 9 processor chip seen through a translucent layer of the laptop's chassis. Digital energy pulses from the chip. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A dramatic zoom-in through the laptop's chassis to reveal a stylized, glowing Ryzen 9 processor. Digital energy pulses from the chip in slow motion. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
sceneData.voiceLine: At its core, the raw power of the Ryzen 9 series processor, engineered for elite-tier performance.

scenes.voiceScript: In the world of portable performance, a new champion emerges. Meet the ASUS ROG Strix G15. At its core, the raw power of the Ryzen 9 series processor, engineered for elite-tier performance. Paired with a massive 32 gigabytes of DDR5 RAM, multitasking becomes effortless and loading times vanish. The graphical heart of this machine is the NVIDIA RTX 4050, delivering next-generation visuals and AI-powered performance. Experience gaming as it's meant to be, with fluid frame rates and breathtaking detail. The high-refresh-rate display ensures you never miss a single frame of the action. But it's not just for gaming. The stunning 4K OLED display brings content to life with true-to-life colors and infinite contrast. For creators, this means seamless 4K editing and rendering, turning your vision into reality without compromise. All this power is encased in a signature ROG design that's both stylish and functional. The ASUS ROG Strix G15. Unbeatable performance. Uncompromised power.
scenes.thumbnailPrompt: Dramatic hero shot of the ASUS ROG Strix G15 laptop, slightly open, with the RGB keyboard glowing intensely in a dark, moody environment. Cinematic lighting, sharp focus, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
scenes.globalVisualStyle: Sleek, futuristic, cinematic product showcase in a dark studio environment with vibrant RGB neon lighting. Hyper-realistic rendering, 8K resolution, professional and clean aesthetic.
